deploy.startCommand: sed -i 's/translateY(-100px);/translateY(-100px);opacity:0;/' public/index.html && sed -i 's/#toast.show {/#toast.show {opacity:1;/' public/index.html && sed -i 's|/ida-logo.png|Modern%20Indian%20Drivers%20Association%20logo.png|g' public/index.html && sed -i 's|class="header-logo">
